metadata.title: Stocks Fall Before Nvidia’s High-Stakes AI Results: Markets Wrap
metadata.description: A selloff in the world’s largest technology companies drove stocks to their longest slide since August, underscoring the American market’s narrow reliance on a handful of growth giants.
metadata.keywords: Artificial Intelligence,NVIDIA CORP,Stocks,Earnings,Market Sentiment,Capital Markets,Wall Street,S&P 500 INDEX,Federal Reserve,Unemployment Rate,markets
